headline: PulteGroup: A Year Later, You're Paying More For A Dimmer Forecast
summary: PulteGroup is downgraded to Sell, as share price has risen amid a deteriorating earnings outlook and negative estimate revisions. Read more on PHM stock here.

headline: Is PulteGroup, Inc. (PHM) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is PHM a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on PulteGroup, Inc. on InfoArb Sheets’s Substack. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on PHM. PulteGroup, Inc.’s share was trading at $122.78 as of June 9th. PHM’s trailing and forward P/E were 11.87 and 12.24 respectively according to Yahoo Finance. PulteGroup, […]

headline: Assessing PulteGroup (PHM) Valuation As Western Inventory And Affordability Pressures Surface
summary: PulteGroup stock: Oregon and Washington inventory issues come into focus Remarks from PulteGroup (PHM) VP of investor relations Jim Zeumer about lingering spec inventory and affordability adjustments in Oregon and Washington put current Western market pressures front and center for investors assessing the stock. See our latest analysis for PulteGroup. At a share price of $118.49, PulteGroup has seen short term share price pressure with a 1 day decline of 3.49%. However, its 1 year total...
